title: aeschynomene evenia var. evenia
intro: Aeschynomene evenia var. evenia, also known as the small hop senna, is a perennial leguminous plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Aeschynomene evenia var. evenia include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
